title: Bactris maguirei
taxonomy: Bactris maguirei is classified as a species of palm tree in the family Arecaceae. It belongs to the genus Bactris, which is a group of palms native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The genus Bactris is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics. Bactris maguirei is specifically native to the countries of Colombia and Venezuela. Its classification as a species within the Arecaceae family makes it a part of a diverse group of plants.
